rollbackStepsPublicSafe: Review the prior approved launcher release notes and changed public-safe configuration files.
Confirm with Dani whether the operator should return to the previous reviewed launcher plan.
Prepare a human-reviewed git revert or configuration restoration outside any live system.
Run launcher validators again before any later approved activation path.
evidenceExpected: A08 doctor output saved by the operator if needed.
Human approval record outside this public repository.
operatorNextSteps: Run npm run -s doctor:rollback for shape validation.
Keep all credentials, provider consoles and operator data outside the launcher repository.
Use a later Dani-approved PR for any real rollback execution capability.
publicSafeSummary: This example is a rollback readiness plan only. It contains no secret, provider payload, operator data, deletion command, live rollback action or private runtime code.
